label: money
groundingNote: small things of one kind; when someone wants a thing, this someone can {urn:kernel-v0:give|give} some of them to another someone, after this this someone can {urn:kernel-v0:take|take} the thing; because of this, people want them very much; people do many things because of this
notes: Institutional kind; the exchange convention is stated, the institution behind it is not decomposed (m0b classed money as institution-molecule).
